name: cad-plugins
description: Codex and Claude skills plus Python utilities for converting DWG/DXF CAD files into canonical DXF, quick summaries, focused inspection, and readable previews.

interface.shortDescription: Convert, summarize, inspect, and render CAD files for agents.
interface.longDescription: A small cross-platform CAD agent toolkit. It treats DXF as the canonical working format, converts DWG through local tools, parses annotation-aware CAD structure, and renders purpose-specific previews instead of relying on one overloaded screenshot.
defaultPrompt: Use cad-convert to normalize DWG/DXF inputs to DXF before analysis.
Use cad-quicklook for a short first-pass summary, cad-render for readable previews, and cad-inspect for targeted CAD questions.
